mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_tokens (token, user_id, last_seen) VALUES (#{token}, #{userId}, #{lastSeen})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.user_id) FROM auth_tokens t INNER JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE u.status = 'active' AND t.last_seen >= #{since}

SELECT LEFT(t.last_seen, 10) AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT t.user_id) AS count FROM auth_tokens t INNER JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE u.status = 'active' AND t.last_seen IS NOT NULL AND LEFT(t.last_seen, 10) >= #{dateFrom} AND LEFT(t.last_seen, 10) <= #{dateTo} GROUP BY LEFT(t.last_seen, 10) ORDER BY LEFT(t.last_seen, 10) ASC
